videos.headline: Kyle Monangai makes a nice cut for a Rutgers TD
videos.description: Kyle Monangai gets the carry and makes a nice move for a score as Rutgers leads 24-0 vs. Northwestern.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyle Monangai makes a nice cut for a Rutgers TD) 2023/09/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ian Strong makes impressive TD grab on Rutgers' opening drive
videos.description: Ian Strong's nice catch in the end zone is ruled a touchdown, giving Rutgers an early 7-0 lead over Northwestern.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ian Strong makes impressive TD grab on Rutgers' opening drive) 2023/09/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Northwestern's Ben Bryant gets picked off late in 1st half
videos.description: Max Melton picks off Ben Bryant with less than two minutes remaining in the first half as Rutgers leads vs. Northwestern.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Northwestern's Ben Bryant gets picked off late in 1st half) 2023/09/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gavin Wimsatt muscles his way for a Rutgers TD
videos.description: Gavin Wimsatt pounds it in for the score as Rutgers extends its lead to 14-0 vs. Northwestern.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gavin Wimsatt muscles his way for a Rutgers TD) 2023/09/03 ESHEET
